title: Gorimn wine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Gorimn [[Wine/Legends|wine]]''' was a kind of [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage made and ingested by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] consumed gorimn wine and [[Gralinyn juice|graling juice]] on [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Mallatobuck/Legends|Mallatobuck's]] wedding day. Wookiees thought it mild, though it was very strong to [[Human/Legends|Humans]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
